provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Mutual Assistance in Criminal Matters Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application of Act
provisions.content:
3. Application of Act
(1) Where an arrangement has been made with a foreign country for mutual assistance in criminal matters, the Minister may by statutory instrument make regulations that this Act shall apply to that country.
(2) Regulations made under subsection (1) may provide that the application of this Act to a foreign country shall be subject to such limitations, conditions, exceptions or qualifications as are necessary to give effect to an arrangement made between Botswana and that country.

provisions.title: Object of Act
Refusal of assistance

definitions.definition: a form approved by the Director of Public Prosecutions in writing for the purposes of the provision in which the expression occurs
a convention, protocol, agreement, scheme, or treaty

an order made by court, whether conviction or non-conviction based, for the forfeiture of any property or its realisation to satisfy any order under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
an investigation into an offence (whether the offence is believed to have been committed, to be being committed or to be likely to be committed)
an order, made under the law of a foreign country, for the forfeiture of property in respect of an offence against the law of that country

a person who is being held in custody pending trial for or sentence for, or is under a sentence of imprisonment for, an offence against a law of a foreign country, but does not include a person who is at large after having escaped from lawful custody

an order, made under the law of a foreign country, restraining a particular person, or all persons, from dealing with property, being an order made in respect of an offence against the law of that country
an offence against a law of a foreign country
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
a serious offence against a law of a foreign country
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
an investigation into an offence conducted by the Republic of Botswana and foreign counterparts
a person who is responsible for investigation, apprehension or detention of persons suspected or convicted of an offence under the Laws of Botswana
any person appointed as a Magistrate Grade I or over in accordance with the Magistrates' Courts Act (Cap. 04:04)
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
an offence against a law relating to taxation, customs duties or other revenue matters or relating to foreign exchange control

definitions.term: offence under the ordinary criminal law of Botswana
definitions.definition: an offence against the laws of Botswana other than an offence under the military law of Botswana
gaol, lock-up or other place of detention
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
